sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'bir' (a/an) does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence.
'hesap' (account) and 'ssk' (social security) refer to completely different entities, which changes the meaning of the request.
The insertion of 'iş' (work/job) introduces an unrelated concept, making the sentence less coherent.
